items.name: Health
items.example: Health is very important.

items.name: Healthcare
items.example: Good healthcare saves lives.

items.name: Wellness
items.example: She focuses on her wellness.

items.name: Fitness
items.example: He goes to the gym for fitness.

items.name: Nutrition
items.example: Good nutrition keeps you strong.

items.name: Diet
items.example: She follows a healthy diet.

items.name: Exercise
items.example: Daily exercise improves health.

items.name: Workout
items.example: He does a workout every morning.

items.name: Hospital
items.example: She was admitted to the hospital.

items.name: Clinic
items.example: He visited a small clinic nearby.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் அருகிலுள்ள ஒரு சிறிய மருத்துவ நிலையத்திற்கு சென்றான்.

items.name: Doctor
items.example: The doctor examined the patient.

items.name: Physician
items.example: She consulted a physician for her fever.
items.exampleTamil: அவள் காய்ச்சலுக்காக ஒரு மருத்துவரிடம் ஆலோசனை பெற்றாள்.

items.name: Surgeon
items.example: The surgeon performed the operation.
items.exampleTamil: அறுவை சிகிச்சை மருத்துவர் அறுவை சிகிச்சையை செய்தார்.

items.name: Nurse
items.example: The nurse took care of the patient.

items.name: Pharmacist
items.example: The pharmacist gave the medicine.

items.name: Therapist
items.example: He met a therapist for his back pain.

items.name: Dentist
items.example: She visited the dentist for a checkup.

items.name: Patient
items.example: The patient is recovering well.

items.name: Appointment
items.example: He booked an appointment with the doctor.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் மருத்துவரிடம் ஒரு சந்திப்பு நேரம் ஒதுக்கினான்.

items.name: Diagnosis
items.example: The diagnosis confirmed the illness.

items.name: Treatment
items.example: He is undergoing treatment for his condition.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் தனது நிலைமைக்கு சிகிச்சை பெற்று வருகிறான்.

items.name: Therapy
items.example: She attends physical therapy weekly.
items.exampleTamil: அவள் வாரந்தோறும் உடல் சிகிச்சை முறைக்கு செல்கிறாள்.

items.name: Medicine
items.example: Take this medicine twice a day.
items.exampleTamil: இந்த மருந்தை நாளுக்கு இரண்டு முறை எடுத்துக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.

items.name: Tablet
items.example: He took a tablet for his headache.

items.name: Capsule
items.example: She swallowed the capsule with water.

items.name: Syrup
items.example: The child drank cough syrup.

items.name: Injection
items.example: The nurse gave him an injection.
items.exampleTamil: செவிலியர் அவனுக்கு ஒரு ஊசி மருந்தை கொடுத்தார்.

items.name: Vaccine
items.example: The child received the vaccine.

items.name: Prescription
items.example: The doctor wrote a prescription.

items.name: Pharmacy
items.example: She bought medicine from the pharmacy.

items.name: Ambulance
items.example: The ambulance arrived quickly.

items.name: Emergency
items.example: Call for help in an emergency.

items.name: First Aid
items.example: He gave first aid to the injured man.

items.name: Blood
items.example: He donated blood at the camp.

items.name: Heart
items.example: The heart pumps blood through the body.

items.name: Brain
items.example: The brain controls the body.

items.name: Lung
items.example: Smoking damages the lungs.

items.name: Liver
items.example: The liver filters toxins from blood.

items.name: Kidney
items.example: The kidney removes waste from the body.

items.name: Bone
items.example: He fractured a bone in his leg.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் தனது காலில் ஒரு எலும்பை முறித்துக் கொண்டான்.

items.name: Muscle
items.example: Exercise builds muscle strength.

items.name: Skin
items.example: Apply this cream on the skin.

items.name: Eye
items.example: She has good eyesight.

items.name: Ear
items.example: He has an ear infection.

items.name: Nose
items.example: His nose is blocked due to cold.

items.name: Mouth
items.example: Open your mouth for the checkup.

items.name: Tooth
items.example: He has a decayed tooth.

items.name: Fever
items.example: The child has a high fever.

items.name: Cold
items.example: She caught a cold last week.

items.name: Cough
items.example: He has a bad cough.

items.name: Headache
items.example: She has a severe headache.

items.name: Stomachache
items.example: He has a stomachache after eating.
items.exampleTamil: சாப்பிட்ட பிறகு அவனுக்கு வயிற்று வலி உள்ளது.

items.name: Sore Throat
items.example: She has a sore throat and cough.

items.name: Infection
items.example: The wound got infected.

items.name: Allergy
items.example: He has an allergy to dust.

items.name: Virus
items.example: The virus spreads quickly.

items.name: Bacteria
items.example: Bacteria caused the infection.

items.name: Disease
items.example: This disease is curable.

items.name: Illness
items.example: He recovered from his illness.

items.name: Injury
items.example: He suffered a minor injury.

items.name: Fracture
items.example: She has a fracture in her arm.

items.name: Burn
items.example: He got a burn on his hand.

items.name: Wound
items.example: Clean the wound before bandaging.

items.name: Pain
items.example: She feels pain in her back.

items.name: Swelling
items.example: There is swelling around the injury.

items.name: Bleeding
items.example: Stop the bleeding with a bandage.

items.name: Recovery
items.example: His recovery is progressing well.

items.name: Operation
items.example: He underwent an operation yesterday.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் நேற்று ஒரு அறுவை சிகிச்சைக்கு உட்பட்டான்.

items.name: Surgery
items.example: The surgery was successful.

items.name: Checkup
items.example: She goes for a regular checkup.

items.name: Medical Test
items.example: He underwent several medical tests.

items.name: X-Ray
items.example: The doctor ordered an X-ray.

items.name: Scan
items.example: She had a scan done for her injury.
items.exampleTamil: அவள் தனது காயத்திற்காக ஒரு ஸ்கேன் எடுத்தாள்.

items.name: Ultrasound
items.example: The ultrasound showed no problem.
items.exampleTamil: அல்ட்ராசவுண்ட் எந்த பிரச்சனையும் இல்லை என்று காட்டியது.

items.name: MRI
items.example: He got an MRI scan for his knee.
items.exampleTamil: அவன் தனது முழங்காலுக்காக எம்ஆர்ஐ ஸ்கேன் எடுத்தான்.

items.name: CT Scan
items.example: The CT scan revealed the fracture.

items.name: Laboratory
items.example: The sample was sent to the laboratory.

items.name: Blood Test
items.example: She had a blood test this morning.
items.exampleTamil: அவள் இன்று காலை ஒரு இரத்த பரிசோதனை செய்தாள்.

items.name: Urine Test
items.example: The doctor asked for a urine test.

items.name: Oxygen
items.example: The patient needed extra oxygen.

items.name: Pulse
items.example: The nurse checked his pulse.

items.name: Blood Pressure
items.example: His blood pressure is normal.

items.name: Temperature
items.example: Check his temperature with a thermometer.

items.name: Mental Health
items.example: Mental health is as important as physical health.

items.name: Stress
items.example: Work causes him a lot of stress.
items.exampleTamil: வேலை அவனுக்கு அதிக மன அழுத்தத்தை ஏற்படுத்துகிறது.

items.name: Anxiety
items.example: She feels anxiety before exams.
items.exampleTamil: தேர்வுக்கு முன் அவளுக்கு கவலை நோய் ஏற்படுகிறது.

items.name: Depression
items.example: He is being treated for depression.

items.name: Sleep
items.example: Good sleep improves health.

items.name: Hydration
items.example: Hydration is important in summer.

items.name: Hygiene
items.example: Personal hygiene prevents illness.

items.name: Sanitation
items.example: Good sanitation reduces disease spread.
items.exampleTamil: நல்ல சுத்தம் மற்றும் தூய்மை நோய் பரவலை குறைக்கும்.

items.name: Mask
items.example: Wear a mask in crowded places.

items.name: Gloves
items.example: The doctor wore gloves during the checkup.

items.name: Bandage
items.example: She wrapped a bandage around the wound.

items.name: Wheelchair
items.example: He moves around in a wheelchair.

items.name: Crutches
items.example: She walks with crutches after surgery.
items.exampleTamil: அறுவை சிகிச்சைக்குப் பிறகு அவள் ஊன்றுகோலுடன் நடக்கிறாள்.

items.name: Health Insurance
items.example: He has health insurance for his family.
items.exampleTamil: அவனுக்கு தனது குடும்பத்திற்கு சுகாதார காப்பீடு உள்ளது.

items.name: Medical Record
items.example: The hospital keeps his medical record.

items.name: Discharge
items.example: She was given discharge after recovery.
items.exampleTamil: குணமடைந்த பிறகு அவளுக்கு மருத்துவமனையிலிருந்து வெளியேற்றம் வழங்கப்பட்டது
